name: devnexus
description: Chain Jira and Bitbucket workflows with @nexus in Copilot Chat. Natural language DevOps operations across any Jira Server and Bitbucket Server instance.

chatParticipants.name: nexus
chatParticipants.description: Manage Jira tickets and Bitbucket PRs with natural language. Try: 'create a subtask under PROJ-123 with label review'

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_issue
languageModelTools.description: Fetch a Jira issue's details including summary, status, labels, fix versions, assignee, and subtasks.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_create_issue
languageModelTools.description: Create a new Jira issue (Story, Task, or Bug) in a project.

assignee.description: Assignee username, or 'self' for current user

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_create_subtask
languageModelTools.description: Create a subtask under a parent Jira issue. Inherits fix versions from parent if not specified.

fixVersions.description: Fix versions (inherited from parent if omitted)

assignee.description: Assignee username, or 'self' for current user

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_search
languageModelTools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL query. Returns matching issues with key, summary, status, and assignee.

jql.description: JQL query string, e.g. 'project = PROJ AND status = Open'

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_transition
languageModelTools.description: Move a Jira issue through its workflow (e.g. Open → In Progress → Done).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_add_comment
languageModelTools.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_update_fields
languageModelTools.description: Update fields on a Jira issue (labels, fix versions, assignee, priority, summary, description, time estimates).

fields.description: Fields to update. Keys: summary, description, labels, fixVersions, assignee, priority, originalEstimate, remainingEstimate

originalEstimate.description: Original estimate in Jira duration format, e.g. '2h', '1d 4h'

remainingEstimate.description: Remaining estimate in Jira duration format, e.g. '2h', '30m'

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_log_work
languageModelTools.description: Log time spent working on a Jira issue (adds a worklog entry).

timeSpent.description: Time spent in Jira duration format, e.g. '2h', '1h 30m'

started.description: ISO 8601 datetime when work started, e.g. '2026-06-04T09:00:00.000+0000'. Defaults to now if omitted.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_link_issues
languageModelTools.description: Create a link between two Jira issues (e.g. blocks, relates to, is caused by).

linkType.description: Link type name: 'blocks', 'is blocked by', 'relates to', 'is caused by', 'causes', 'duplicates'

inwardKey.description: The inward issue key (the issue that IS blocked/caused/etc.)

outwardKey.description: The outward issue key (the issue that blocks/causes/etc.)

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_list_subtasks
languageModelTools.description: List all subtasks of a parent Jira issue with their key, summary, status, and assignee.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_assign
languageModelTools.description: Assign a Jira issue to a user. Use 'self' to assign to yourself.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_list_prs
languageModelTools.description: List pull requests. Filter by state (OPEN/MERGED/DECLINED) and role (mine/reviewing/all).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_pr
languageModelTools.description: Get full details of a pull request including title, description, reviewers, and status.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_create_pr
languageModelTools.description: Create a new pull request from a source branch to a target branch.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_merge_pr
languageModelTools.description: Merge a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_changes
languageModelTools.description: List all changed files in a pull request with their change type (ADD/MODIFY/DELETE).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_diff
languageModelTools.description: Get the diff of a specific file in a pull request.

filePath.description: Path to the file within the repo

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_add_comment
languageModelTools.description: Add a general or inline comment to a pull request.

filePath.description: File path for inline comment (omit for general comment)

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_list_comments
languageModelTools.description: List all comments on a pull request, showing author, date, text, and file location.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_add_reviewer
languageModelTools.description: Add a reviewer to a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_remove_reviewer
languageModelTools.description: Remove a reviewer from a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_approve_pr
languageModelTools.description: Approve a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_decline_pr
languageModelTools.description: Decline a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_needs_work
languageModelTools.description: Mark a pull request as needs work for the current reviewer.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_create_branch
languageModelTools.description: Create a new branch in the repository.

startPoint.description: Base branch or commit to branch from (default 'develop')

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_list_initiative_issues
languageModelTools.displayName: Jira: List Issues Under Epic / Initiative
languageModelTools.description: List all child issues (stories, tasks) and their sub-issues (subtasks) under a Jira epic, solution initiative, or any parent issue. Use this for any 'list/show issues under XXXX' request. Shows key, summary, status, assignee, start date, due date, and forecast completion.

initiativeKey.description: Solution initiative issue key, e.g. NGAINTSYS-11319

assignee.description: Username to filter by. Omit or use 'self' for current user.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_update_issue_dates
languageModelTools.description: Update date fields on a Jira issue: start date, due date, or forecast completion. Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.

startDate.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pass empty string to clear.

dueDate.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pass empty string to clear.

forecastCompletion.description: Forecast completion date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Pass empty string to clear.

forecastFieldId.description: Custom field ID for forecast completion (e.g. 'customfield_10052'). Override if your Jira uses a different field.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_review_complete
languageModelTools.description: Posts 'Independent review complete' on the originating ticket if the issue has a FMS_*_REVIEW label (follows 'relates to' link), otherwise posts on the ticket itself.

issueKey.description: The review ticket key, e.g. PROJ-789

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_list_repos
languageModelTools.description: List all repositories in a Bitbucket project.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_branches
languageModelTools.description: List branches in a Bitbucket repo, optionally filtered by name.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_delete_issue
languageModelTools.description: Permanently delete a Jira issue.

issueKey.description: Issue key to delete, e.g. PROJ-123

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_clone_issue
languageModelTools.description: Clone an existing Jira issue, copying its type, description, labels, and fix versions. Override any field in the clone.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_bulk_create
languageModelTools.description: Create multiple Jira issues in a single API call.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_list_comments
languageModelTools.description: List all comments on a Jira issue.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_update_comment
languageModelTools.description: Update the text of an existing comment on a Jira issue.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_delete_comment
languageModelTools.description: Delete a comment from a Jira issue.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_list_worklogs
languageModelTools.description: List all work log entries on a Jira issue, showing who logged time and how much.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_update_worklog
languageModelTools.description: Update an existing worklog entry (change time spent or start time).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_delete_worklog
languageModelTools.description: Delete a worklog entry from a Jira issue.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_delete_link
languageModelTools.description: Delete a link between two Jira issues by link ID (visible on issue details).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_list_link_types
languageModelTools.description: List all valid issue link type names (blocks, relates to, duplicates, etc.).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_watchers
languageModelTools.description: Get the list of watchers on a Jira issue.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_watch_issue
languageModelTools.description: Start watching a Jira issue (subscribe to notifications). Optionally add another user as a watcher.

username.description: Username to add as watcher (omit for self)

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_unwatch_issue
languageModelTools.description: Stop watching a Jira issue. Optionally remove another user from watchers.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_vote_issue
languageModelTools.description: Vote for a Jira issue (upvote to indicate importance).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_list_projects
languageModelTools.description: List all accessible Jira projects with their keys, names, and project leads.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_project_versions
languageModelTools.description: List all fix versions defined in a Jira project.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_project_components
languageModelTools.description: List all components defined in a Jira project.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_issue_types
languageModelTools.description: List all available Jira issue types (Story, Task, Bug, Sub-task, etc.) with their IDs.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_priorities
languageModelTools.description: List all available issue priority levels (Blocker, Critical, Major, Minor, Trivial).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_fields
languageModelTools.description: List all available Jira fields — standard and custom — with their IDs and types. Use to discover custom field IDs.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_changelog
languageModelTools.description: Get the full change history of a Jira issue (who changed what and when).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_create_version
languageModelTools.description: Create a new fix version in a Jira project.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_update_version
languageModelTools.description: Update a fix version (mark as released/archived, change name or dates).

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_search_users
languageModelTools.description: Search for Jira users by name or username. Use to find usernames for assignment.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_user
languageModelTools.description: Get a Jira user's profile by exact username.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_boards
languageModelTools.description: List Agile boards. Optionally filter by project key.

projectKey.description: Filter by project key, e.g. PROJ

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_sprints
languageModelTools.description: List sprints on a board. Filter by state: active, future, or closed.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_sprint_issues
languageModelTools.description: List all issues in a sprint.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_move_to_sprint
languageModelTools.description: Move one or more issues into a sprint.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_jira_get_epics
languageModelTools.description: List epics on a board.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_delete_branch
languageModelTools.description: Delete a branch from a Bitbucket repository.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_default_branch
languageModelTools.description: Get the default branch of the repository.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_set_default_branch
languageModelTools.description: Set the default branch of the repository.

branchName.description: Branch name to set as default

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_update_pr
languageModelTools.description: Update a pull request's title, description, or target branch.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_reopen_pr
languageModelTools.description: Reopen a declined pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_pr_commits
languageModelTools.description: List all commits included in a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_commits
languageModelTools.description: Get commit history for a branch or file path.

until.description: Branch name to get commits from

path.description: Filter commits that touch a specific file path

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_commit
languageModelTools.description: Get details of a single commit by its SHA.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_list_tasks
languageModelTools.description: List all tasks (to-do items) on a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_create_task
languageModelTools.description: Create a task (to-do item) on a pull request, optionally anchored to a comment.

commentId.description: Anchor the task to a specific comment ID (optional)

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_resolve_task
languageModelTools.description: Mark a pull request task as resolved.

prId.description: Pull request ID (needed to fetch task version)

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_delete_task
languageModelTools.description: Delete a task from a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_update_comment
languageModelTools.description: Update the text of an existing comment on a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_delete_comment
languageModelTools.description: Delete a comment from a pull request.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_reply_to_comment
languageModelTools.description: Reply to an existing comment on a pull request (threaded reply).

parentCommentId.description: Parent comment ID to reply to

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_file
languageModelTools.description: Get the raw content of a file from the repository at a specific branch.

path.description: File path within the repo, e.g. 'src/main.py'

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_browse
languageModelTools.description: Browse the file tree of a repository at a specific path and branch.

path.description: Directory path to browse (omit for root)

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_compare
languageModelTools.description: Compare two branches — shows commits and file changes between them.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_list_tags
languageModelTools.description: List all tags in the repository, optionally filtered by name.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_create_tag
languageModelTools.description: Create a new tag pointing to a commit.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_delete_tag
languageModelTools.description: Delete a tag from the repository.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_get_build_status
languageModelTools.description: Get CI/CD build statuses reported for a specific commit.

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_set_build_status
languageModelTools.description: Report a CI/CD build status for a commit (SUCCESSFUL, FAILED, or INPROGRESS).

url.description: URL to the build details page

languageModelTools.name: devnexus_bb_check_merge
languageModelTools.displayName: Bitbucket: Check if PR Can Merge
languageModelTools.description: Check whether a pull request is mergeable and what is blocking it (failed checks, missing approvals, unresolved tasks, etc.).

devnexus.jira.startDateFieldId.description: Jira custom field ID for Start Date (e.g. customfield_56601)

devnexus.jira.forecastDateFieldId.description: Jira custom field ID for Forecast Completion Date (e.g. customfield_56806)

devnexus.bitbucket.repo.description: Bitbucket repository slug (optional — leave empty for project-wide access)

viewsWelcome.contents:
Set up Jira credentials to see your issues.
[Set Jira Credentials](command:devnexus.setJiraCredentials)

Set up Bitbucket token to see pull requests.
[Set Bitbucket Token](command:devnexus.setBitbucketToken)
